title: Evangelion 30 US Release Date
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 3.0 : US Release Date Post by Amitch1991 » Sat Dec 22, 2012 6:37 am I recently read on Wikipedia that the release date for Eva 3.0 in the US is January 13th 2013, just wondering if this is confirmed or not ?

[]: Post by Reichu » Sat Dec 22, 2012 12:00 pm http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/13484/NO-SPOILERS-30-coming-in-January/ Believe it when Funimation announces it themselves.
